name: FF4J
description: Open-source Java feature toggle library with string-based flag names, 20+ database backends, audit trail and Spring Boot starter with web console and REST API.

seo.title: FF4J — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: FF4J: Open-source Java feature toggle library with string-based flag names, 20+ database backends, audit trail and Spring Boot starter with web console and REST

when_to_use: Java feature toggles with 20+ database backends
Spring Boot starter with REST API and web console
Audit trail of flag changes for compliance reviews
Fine-grained RBAC for flag management in enterprise apps

pros: Mature Java toggle library with many backends
Spring Boot starter with web console
Audit trail and REST API included
cons: UI and DX feel dated by 2026 standards
Community activity modest vs Togglz and OSS peers
review.verdict: Serviceable Java flag library with many storage options; most new Java projects should also evaluate Togglz.
review.best_for: Java/Spring shops wanting in-process flags with many backends
review.not_for: Polyglot teams or experimentation-focused product orgs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
